pageDescription: Manage landing page news posts for chisto.mk
readOnlyHint: Your role can view news posts; only editors can create or publish content.

create.title: New news post
create.description: Create a draft post. Add full content in all locales before publishing.
create.slugPlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-generate from title

table.title: Title
table.postsCount: {count, plural, one {# post} other {# posts}} · page {page}

toolbar.label: Document toolbar
toolbar.formattingHint: Click a paragraph to format text
toolbar.emptyBodyHint: Use Insert to add your first paragraph, heading, or media block.
toolbar.mediaBlockHint: Upload via Insert → Image/Video, or choose from the media library.
toolbar.mediaLibraryHint: Upload media from Insert in the toolbar. Reuse assets here and add alt text.
toolbar.mediaBlockImageHint: Use Insert → Image, or pick from the media library.
toolbar.mediaBlockVideoHint: Use Insert → Video, or pick from the media library.
toolbar.mediaBlockVideoUploadHint: Click or drop a video here
toolbar.mediaBlockImageUploadHint: Click or drop an image here

empty.noPostsDescription: Create your first post to publish updates on the chisto.mk news hub.
empty.noFilterDescription: Try a different status or category, or clear filters to see everything.
empty.noSearchDescription: Nothing matched “{query}”. Try another title or slug.

form.scheduledAtHint: Pick a future date and time. Leave empty to publish manually.
form.title: Title
form.excerptPlaceholder: Add a short summary for the news hub and social previews…
form.caption: Caption
form.copyFromEn: Copy title, excerpt & body from EN
form.uploadCoverHint: Recommended 2100 × 900 px (21:9). JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC · max 25 MB.
form.addImageHint: Up to 1920 px wide · min 128 × 128 px · max 10 MB. JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
form.addVideoHint: 1080p recommended (1920 × 1080) · MP4, MOV, or WebM · max 25 MB.
form.noMediaHint: Upload a cover image or add inline media to enrich your post.
form.linkDialogDescription: Highlight text in the paragraph, or enter link text below when nothing is selected.
form.linkDialogDescriptionInsert: Enter the link text and URL to insert a new link at the cursor.
form.linkTextEmpty: No text highlighted. Type link text above or select words in the paragraph.
form.linkInvalidUrl: Enter a valid http(s) or mailto URL.
form.linkTextRequired: Enter link text or highlight words in the paragraph.
form.linkApplyFailed: Could not apply the link. Try again.
form.htmlBlockWarning: Advanced block. Use only when rich paragraphs are not enough. Content is sanitized on save.
form.htmlAllowedEmbedsHint: YouTube and Vimeo embeds only. Other tags and scripts are removed on save.
form.htmlSanitizeDiff: Preview differs. Unsafe markup will be removed on save
form.htmlSourceStats: {lines, plural, one {# line} other {# lines}} · {chars, plural, one {# char} other {# chars}}
form.htmlPreviewEmptyHint: Paste HTML or insert a YouTube/Vimeo embed to see a preview.
form.embedUrlRequired: Enter a YouTube or Vimeo URL.
form.embedUrlInvalid: Only YouTube and Vimeo links are supported.
form.videoPlaybackError: This video could not be previewed. Try MP4 (H.264) or WebM, or re-upload the file.
form.emptyBodyHint: Use + between blocks to add paragraphs, headings, images, galleries, and more.
form.coverPlaceholder: Add a cover image for the news hub and social previews.
form.coverHint: Recommended 2100 × 900 px (21:9). JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC · max 25 MB.
form.galleryHint: Use 4:3 images · 1600 × 1200 px recommended · at least 2 slides.
form.galleryMinSlidesHint: Add at least 2 photos to publish.

editor.readOnlyBanner: You have read-only access. Contact an admin to edit news posts.
editor.unsavedLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

previewBlocks.unknownBlock: Unsupported block type (not shown on site)

preview.label: Live preview
preview.fullPageDescription: Full article preview. Updates live while you edit in another tab.
preview.savedSnapshot: Showing last saved version from editor

seo.label: SEO & social
seo.jsonLdAfterPublish: Structured data will be ready after publish
seo.slugTaken: Another post already uses this slug

revisions.label: Revision history
revisions.restoreBody: Current content will be saved as a new revision before restoring.
revisions.clearBody: All saved revisions for this post will be permanently deleted. The current content is not affected.
revisions.retentionHint: Up to {max} revisions are kept automatically.

meta.label: Post metadata
meta.previewHint: Publish the post to preview it on the landing site.

inspector.coverHeroHint: Upload or replace the cover in the editor above.
inspector.coverAltOk: Alt text added for this locale
inspector.coverAltMissing: Add alt text for accessibility and SEO

confirm.publishBody: The post will become visible on the landing site (immediately or at the scheduled time).
confirm.unpublishBody: The post will be removed from the public site and returned to draft.
confirm.archiveBody: Archived posts are hidden from the public site but remain in the admin.
confirm.unsavedRestoreBody: You have unsaved edits. Restoring will replace your current draft with this revision.
confirm.templateBody: This replaces all body blocks for this locale with {count} template blocks.
confirm.removeBlockBody: This section will be removed from your current draft.
confirm.removeBlockBodyWithPreview: The {type} section “{preview}” will be removed from your current draft.
confirm.removeBlockUndoHint: Nothing is saved until you publish or save. Leave without saving to restore this section.

delete.title: Delete post?
delete.body: This permanently removes the post and its media. This cannot be undone.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.scheduleInPast: Scheduled time must be in the future.
validation.coverRequired: Cover image is required before publishing.
validation.localeTitleRequired: All locales need a title before publishing.
validation.localeExcerptRequired: All locales need an excerpt before publishing.
validation.localeBodyRequired: All locales need at least one body block before publishing.
validation.emptyParagraph: Remove empty paragraphs or add text before publishing.
validation.mediaIdRequired: Image and video blocks need uploaded media.
validation.blockLimit: Maximum number of body blocks reached (50).

apiErrors.slugTaken: A post with this slug already exists.
apiErrors.slugImmutable: Slug cannot be changed after publication.
apiErrors.localeRequired: Content is missing for a required locale.
apiErrors.titleRequired: Title is required for all locales.
apiErrors.excerptRequired: Excerpt is required for all locales.
apiErrors.bodyRequired: Body content is required for all locales.
apiErrors.emptyParagraph: Empty paragraph blocks are not allowed.
apiErrors.mediaIdRequired: A body block references missing media.
apiErrors.scheduleInPast: Scheduled time must be in the future.
apiErrors.coverRequired: Cover image is required before publishing.
apiErrors.s3NotConfigured: File upload is not configured on the server.
apiErrors.invalidImageType: This file type isn't supported. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
apiErrors.invalidVideoType: Video must be MP4, MOV, or WebM.
apiErrors.imageTooLarge: This image is over {maxMb} MB. Try a smaller export from Photos.
apiErrors.imageTooSmall: Images must be at least 128 × 128 pixels.
apiErrors.imageDimensionsTooLarge: Image dimensions must not exceed 8192 × 8192 pixels.
apiErrors.imageTypeMismatch: File content does not match its type.
apiErrors.invalidImage: Could not read this image. Try another file.
apiErrors.uploadStorageError: Couldn't save the file. Check your connection and try again.
apiErrors.payloadTooLarge: File exceeds the maximum upload size.
apiErrors.paragraphTooLong: A paragraph exceeds the maximum length.
apiErrors.coverMustBeImage: Cover must be an image file.
apiErrors.galleryTooFewItems: Gallery blocks need at least two images before saving.
apiErrors.invalidHeadingLevel: A heading block has an invalid level.
apiErrors.altTextRequired: Alt text is required for cover and inline images before publishing.
apiErrors.validationFailed: Request validation failed. Check the form and try again.

mediaValidation.invalidImageType: This file type isn't supported. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
mediaValidation.invalidVideoType: Video must be MP4, MOV, or WebM.
mediaValidation.imageTooSmall: Images must be at least 128 × 128 pixels.

insert.paragraph: Rich body text with bold, links, and lists.
insert.heading: Section title to break up long articles.
insert.list: Bullet or numbered list for steps and highlights.
insert.gallery: Swipeable 4:3 carousel with two or more photos.
insert.imageBlock: Full-width photo in the article body.
insert.videoBlock: Embedded video clip in the article body.
insert.html: Custom HTML for embeds and advanced layouts.
insert.cover: Hero image for the news hub and social previews.
insert.image: Upload a photo into the article body.
insert.video: Upload a video clip into the article body.
insert.starterDescription: Pick a block to begin, or use Insert in the toolbar for more options.

drag.droppedSame: {type} block returned to its original position.

mediaGuidance.cover: Recommended {width} × {height} px ({aspect}). JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC · min {minPx} px · max {maxMb} MB.
mediaGuidance.inlineImage: Up to {recommendedWidth} px wide · min {minPx} × {minPx} px · max {maxMb} MB. JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
mediaGuidance.galleryImage: Recommended {width} × {height} px ({aspect}) · min {minPx} px · max {maxMb} MB. JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
mediaGuidance.video: Up to {recommendedWidth}p ({width} × {height}) recommended · MP4, MOV, or WebM · max {maxMb} MB.
mediaGuidance.library: Cover 21:9 · inline images up to 1920 px wide · gallery 4:3 · video up to 1080p. Upload via Insert.

toast.altSaveFailed: Could not save image alt text
toast.unsavedMessage: Save the draft before changing publish status.
toast.mediaInUseMessage: Remove this media from the body before deleting it.
toast.conflictMessage: This post was updated elsewhere. Reload the latest version before saving.
toast.duplicatedMediaHint: Text copied. Re-add cover and inline media.
